name: The Mavin's Way to Pickle Beef or Tongue
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef Brisket or Beef Tongue
recipeInstructions:
Saltpeter controversy means use a substitute.
From "Putting Food By": Use pure crystalline ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) instead of saltpeter. Add at the rate of 0.05% of meat weight, roughly 1/4 teaspoon for every 5 pounds of meat.
Buy brisket with good marbling. This cut is usually cheaper but works well here. Use exact 3 lb amount as other ingredients are measured by this.
Place meat in deep glass bowl or stoneware crock. Pour quart water into separate bowl. Mix remaining ingredients and pour over meat, adding enough water to fully cover. Tightly cover and refrigerate. Keep in coldest part of fridge.
Marinate for 19 days. Every 2 days turn meat with wooden spoons; add only a little water if needed. At end discard brine and rinse meat with cold water. It's ready to cook.
